description: Analyze the operational activity of the medical practice by generating a report of patient record modifications over time. Using the 'DrTuxTest' database (MySQL root user, no password), identify the modification timestamps in the 'IndexNomPrenom' table to count patient dossiers (where FchGnrl_Type is 'Dossier') modified each month. Export the results to '~/Documents/monthly_activity.csv' with the header 'Month,Count', using the 'YYYY-MM' format and sorting chronologically from oldest to newest.
